Basic Details
Vendor name is required
Vendor type is required
Contact person is required
Valid 10-digit mobile required
Valid email is required
Business Details
Company name is required
Address is required
City is required
State is required
6-digit pin required
Country is required
Tax Details
Valid 15-char GST number required
Valid 10-char PAN number required
Bank Details
Bank name is required
Branch name is required
Account number is required
Valid IFSC code required
